title: angiopteris evecta
intro: Angiopteris evecta, also known as the Chinese water fern, is a type of pteridophyte, a group of vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Angiopteris evecta include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in a decoction, with the roots often being used for their medicinal properties.
